task_completion.description: Open the inventory-system project in IntelliJ IDEA
task_completion.visual_evidence: IntelliJ IDEA is open with the 'inventory-system' project visible in the Project tool window.

task_completion.description: Navigate to Java Code Style settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Settings/Preferences dialog is open, specifically navigated to Editor > Code Style > Java.

task_completion.description: Configure settings to prevent wildcard imports
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Imports' tab of the Java Code Style settings, the 'Class count to use import with '*'' (and ideally 'Names count to use static import with '*'') is set to a high value strictly greater than 50 (e.g., 99 or 999).

task_completion.description: Refactor existing wildcard imports to explicit single-class imports
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code editor shows explicit single-class imports (e.g., 'import java.util.List;', 'import java.util.ArrayList;') instead of wildcard imports ('import java.util.*;') in files like Product.java, InventoryService.java, or FileUtils.java.
The Build Output tool window at the bottom of the IDE shows a 'Build completed successfully' message or a green checkmark indicating no compilation errors.

integrity.description: The agent used the IntelliJ IDEA GUI to modify the code style settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the IntelliJ IDEA Settings/Preferences dialog being interacted with, rather than terminal commands editing XML configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the IDE to refactor the code
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the code being edited in the IntelliJ IDEA editor or the 'Optimize Imports' dialog/action being used, rather than terminal text replacement commands like 'sed'.

integrity.description: The compilation was performed genuinely through the IDE or standard build tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The build success is shown in the IDE's native Build tool window or via a genuine Maven/Gradle terminal command, not a mocked echo statement.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/IdeaProjects/inventory-system. To successfully prevent wildcard imports according to the verifier, the 'Class count to use import with '*'' setting must be configured to a value strictly greater than 50 (the default is 5; 99 or 999 are typical valid inputs).
